title: Taper: 1 design rehearsal — favorite case
focus: Run a familiar case to stay in flow.

items.label: Pick a case you know well; run it cleanly in 45 min

interviewQuestions: If this familiar case were changed to require 10x lower latency, what part of your design would change first?
Which trade-off in your favorite case is most likely to be challenged by a senior interviewer?
